name: Classic Sour Cream Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine the cookie crumbs and melted margarine in a bowl, pressing firmly into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk and continue beating until smooth.
5. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the sour cream and vanilla extract.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes, or until lightly browned around the edge (the center should be slightly soft).
8. Cool completely.
9. Chill before serving.
10. Garnish as desired.
11. Store leftovers in the refrigerator.
